one_time_description: Transfer from Settlement Capital Trust (Scotia Wealth) to Woodland Cree First Nation Community Development Trust, plus $8,000,000 transfer from Settlement Capital Account to operating accounts
economic_notes: First Nation owns companies accounted for by equity method valued at $8,468,750. Community Development Trust with net assets of $49,318,730. Settlement Capital Account fully wound down during year with $20,016,236 transferred to Community Development Trust.
notes: Complex consolidation including Settlement Capital Account (wound down during year), Settlement Revenue Account, Trust Accounts (Capital and Revenue), and Woodland Cree First Nation Community Development Trust. The Settlement Capital Account had net assets of $27,847,122 at beginning of year and was fully transferred out during the year ($20,016,236 to Community Development Trust, $8,000,000 to operating via Settlement Revenue Account). The Community Development Trust received the $20,016,236 transfer from Settlement Capital Trust (Scotia Wealth) and had investment income of $2,104,918 with total net assets of $49,318,730 at year end. Prior year accumulated surplus includes equity in settlement trust accounts of $27,847,122 which is nil in current year due to wind-down. Remuneration schedule not included in the provided pages.
